title: Indiana
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in Indiana

Contact your state department of insurance to get consumer help with a health insurance problem or question.

Medicaid in Indiana

You can apply for Medicaid in Indiana by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® in Indiana

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in Indiana

Health Insurance Marketplace® in Indiana

CHIP in Indiana

Hoosier Healthwise covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for Hoosier Healthwise right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about Hoosier Healthwise in Indiana.
